en_title: What to Expect from Summer Game Fest 2026
cn_title: 夏日游戏节2026前瞻：哪些惊喜值得期待
subtitle: 猜猜猜，猜个痛快
opus_summary: 夏日游戏节（Summer Game Fest）将于6月5日举行，届时将首次公开《星球大战：零公司》实机演示，还有《血之信使》《离合器》等新作亮相。Epic Games将展示《堡垒之夜》新赛季预告。玩家期待小岛秀夫、From Software、Persona 6等惊喜，但《GTA6》和《巫师3》新DLC不会出现。

paragraphs.en: It’s that time of year when it's fun to just wildly speculate about what we might see from Geoff Keighley’s Summer Game Fest. Little is known, apart from a few games and studios that have already been teased, and so this gives me plenty of room to dream about what surprises the show may have in store. Taking place on June 5 at 2pm PT/5pm ET/10pm BST, here’s how to watch the stream . Let’s not waste any more time, though, and get straight into what to expect from it.
paragraphs.cn: 又到了一年中最适合天马行空猜测Geoff Keighley的夏日游戏节（Summer Game Fest）会带来什么的时候了。除了少数已预告的游戏和工作室，我们几乎一无所知，这给了我充足的想象空间去憧憬展会可能准备的惊喜。活动将于6月5日下午2点（太平洋时间）/下午5点（东部时间）/晚上10点（英国夏令时）举行，观看直播方式在此。话不多说，直接进入正题，看看我们期待些什么。

paragraphs.en: We’ve been promised a world-first look at Star Wars: Zero Company , the X-COM-inspired take on a galaxy far, far away. A turn-based tactics game co-developed by Bit Reactor and Respawn Entertainment, it places us in control of a mercenary group tasked with fighting in the shadows of the Clone Wars. Sign me up.
paragraphs.cn: 官方承诺将首次公开展示《星球大战：零公司》(Star Wars: Zero Company)，这是一款受《XCOM》启发的遥远星系题材游戏。由Bit Reactor和Respawn Entertainment联合开发的回合制战术游戏，玩家将指挥一支雇佣兵小队，在克隆人战争的阴影中作战。算我一个。

paragraphs.en: Guild Wars developer ArenaNet is confirmed to be attending. Could this finally mean a reveal for Guild Wars 3? The base-game release of Guild Wars 2 came out way back in 2012, and the free-to-play MMORPG series has been ticking over with expansions and updates ever since.SGF could well be time to see the next numbered game in the series. Or maybe it’s just a new expansion. I don’t know.
paragraphs.cn: 《激战》开发商ArenaNet已确认出席。这是否意味着《激战3》终于要揭晓了？《激战2》本体早在2012年发售，此后这款免费MMORPG系列一直通过扩展包和更新维持运营。夏日游戏节很可能成为系列下一部正统续作亮相的时机。或者，也许只是个新扩展包。谁知道呢。

paragraphs.en: Blood Message is one of those games that could blow up if it gets another impressive showing. Set during the Tang Dynasty, it blends stealth and melee combat together as you play as a messenger and his son on a dangerous, linear journey across Asia. A cinematic action-adventure from Chinese studio 24 Entertainment Lin'an, its first teaser, shown last summer, looked stunning, and I’m looking forward to seeing more of it in action here.
paragraphs.cn: 《血之信使》(Blood Message)是那种如果再次惊艳亮相就可能爆红的游戏。故事设定在唐朝，融合了潜行与近战格斗，玩家扮演一名信使和他的儿子，踏上穿越亚洲的危险线性旅程。这款电影化动作冒险游戏出自中国工作室24 Entertainment临安之手，去年夏天放出的首个预告片令人惊艳，我很期待在展会上看到更多实机内容。

paragraphs.en: Teased earlier this week, new driving game Clutch will also be in attendance. Made by a team of ex-Playground devs at new studio Maverick Games, let's hope this open-world narrative racer will pack some of that Forza Horizon punch.
paragraphs.cn: 本周早些时候预告的新驾驶游戏《离合器》(Clutch)也将亮相。由前Playground Games开发者组成的新工作室Maverick Games打造，希望这款开放世界叙事赛车游戏能继承《极限竞速：地平线》的冲击力。

paragraphs.en: Finally, Epic Games will be showcasing a new trailer for its upcoming new season of Fortnite, Runners, which will be revealed by its star, Ben Starr.
paragraphs.cn: 最后，Epic Games将展示《堡垒之夜》新赛季「奔跑者」(Runners)的全新预告片，由明星Ben Starr揭晓。

paragraphs.en: Now for the fun bit. First up, let’s try to answer the one question we all have on our lips when a Geoff Keighley show comes around. Will Hideo Kojima make an appearance? I don’t know, but I’m going to lean towards a ‘yes’ this time. It’s probably far more likely that he’ll come with a new look at his Xbox exclusive horror game OD: Knock , than it is his upcoming stealth-action PlayStation game, Physint , but honestly, I’ll take either.
paragraphs.cn: 现在进入有趣的部分。首先，我们来回答每次Geoff Keighley展会时大家最关心的问题：小岛秀夫会亮相吗？我不知道，但这次我倾向于「会」。他更可能带来Xbox独占恐怖游戏《OD: Knock》的新画面，而不是即将推出的PlayStation潜行动作游戏《Physint》，但老实说，两者我都接受。

paragraphs.en: Another developer that’s no stranger to a stage like this is FromSoftware. It’s been a while since we’ve heard about its Nintendo Switch 2 exclusive PvPvE action RPG, The Duskbloods. Or, if we’re really dreaming, another brand-new announcement from the Elden Ring, Dark Souls, and Bloodborne studio.
paragraphs.cn: 另一个对这种舞台不陌生的开发商是From Software。我们已经有一段时间没听到其任天堂Switch 2独占PvPvE动作RPG《The Duskbloods》的消息了。或者，如果我们真的在做梦，这家打造了《艾尔登法环》《黑暗之魂》和《血源诅咒》的工作室可能会公布另一款全新作品。

paragraphs.en: Speaking of dreaming, I personally would love nothing more than to finally see what Persona 6 looks like. 2026 will mark 10 years since the last mainline entry in the beloved RPG series, and I need it back in my life. I’d also take a look at remake Persona 4: Revival , just to tide me over.
paragraphs.cn: 说到做梦，我个人最想看到的莫过于《女神异闻录6》的真容。2026年将是这款备受喜爱的RPG系列上一部正统续作问世10周年，我需要它回到我的生活中。我也愿意看看重制版《女神异闻录4：重生》(Persona 4: Revival)，先解解馋。

paragraphs.en: The fact that some of the bigger video game publishers don’t host their own showcases anymore means the likelihood of them showing up at SGF is only increased. For example, this feels like the perfect time for Ubisoft to give us another look at Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced ahead of its July 9 release. With new Far Cry and Ghost Recon games reportedly on their way before 2029 , too, could we see either of these revealed?
paragraphs.cn: 一些大型游戏发行商不再举办自己的发布会，这意味着他们出现在夏日游戏节的可能性只会增加。例如，现在正是育碧在7月9日发售前再次展示《刺客信条：黑旗 记忆重置》的绝佳时机。据报道，新的《孤岛惊魂》和《幽灵行动》游戏将在2029年前推出，我们会不会看到其中一款被公布？

paragraphs.en: Similarly, EA could show up and surprise us. It feels like we should be getting closer to knowing more about the third part of Respawn’s Star Wars: Jedi trilogy, so maybe that will be here. And do we dare dream of seeing anything of BioWare’s Mass Effect 5 ? It’s a long shot, but I’d love it. Speaking of Mass Effect, though, there are a couple of games that appear to be taking the spirit of the beloved sci-fi RPG series into their own creations. Exodus has its own dedicated stream attached to the end of the Future Games Show Summer Showcase on June 6, so that may not turn up for SGF, but The Expanse: Osiris Reborn from Owlcat Games could well do.
paragraphs.cn: 同样，EA也可能亮相并给我们惊喜。感觉我们应该离了解更多Respawn的《星球大战：绝地》三部曲第三部更近了，所以也许它会出现在这里。我们敢梦想看到BioWare的《质量效应5》吗？虽然希望渺茫，但我很期待。说到《质量效应》，有几款游戏似乎将这款备受喜爱的科幻RPG系列的精神融入了自己的创作中。《Exodus》在6月6日未来游戏展夏季展示会末尾有自己的专属直播，所以可能不会出现在夏日游戏节，但Owlcat Games的《苍穹浩瀚：奥西里斯重生》(The Expanse: Osiris Reborn)很有可能。

paragraphs.en: Capcom has plenty going on already, but could it throw another new game into the mix? Rumours have been circulating about a new Devil May Cry for a while now, so perhaps, if it exists, we’ll see it here. More likely, though, is some story DLC for Resident Evil Requiem . And what about Konami, who has seen a bit of a resurgence of late. Is it time to see what Bloober’s remake of the original Silent Hill looks like? Or, which Metal Gear Solid could be undergoing the remake treatment next, following the success of Snake Eater?
paragraphs.cn: 卡普空已经有很多项目在进行，但它会不会再扔出一款新游戏？关于新《鬼泣》的传闻已经流传了一段时间，所以如果存在的话，我们可能会在这里看到它。不过更有可能的是《生化危机：安魂曲》的剧情DLC。那么科乐美呢，它最近有点复苏的迹象。是不是该看看Bloober Team重制初代《寂静岭》的样子了？或者，在《食蛇者》成功之后，下一款接受重制待遇的会是哪部《潜龙谍影》？

paragraphs.en: And then there’s Square Enix, which has yet to reveal what the third part of the Final Fantasy 7 Remake will be called. Could June 5 be the day we find out? Let’s hope so. And, yes, there will always be whispers of Kingdom Hearts 4 , as fans clutch their keyblades close to their hearts in hope of a reveal. I wish you all the best.
paragraphs.cn: 然后是史克威尔艾尼克斯，它尚未公布《最终幻想7重制版》第三部的名称。6月5日会不会是我们知道答案的日子？希望如此。当然，总会有关于《王国之心4》的传闻，粉丝们紧握键刃，期盼着公布。祝大家好运。

paragraphs.en: I’m sure that one day, Judas will eventually come out. Ken Levine’s ambitious project has been teased for years and years now, and we’d love to know a release date. We’ll take more gameplay, though. Levine’s previous creation, Bioshock , is, of course, getting a fourth entry of which we’ve heard nearly nothing about. Again, it feels like a long shot, but you never know.
paragraphs.cn: 我相信总有一天《Judas》会发售。Ken Levine这个雄心勃勃的项目已经预告了很多年，我们很想知道发售日期。不过，我们更想要更多实机演示。Levine之前的作品《生化奇兵》当然也在开发第四部，但我们几乎一无所知。再次强调，虽然希望渺茫，但谁知道呢。

paragraphs.en: As for things that are incredibly unlikely,, no, we won’t see anything related to GTA 6 , nor would I get your hopes up for a look at The Witcher 3’s freshly announced Songs of the Past expansion in action, as CD Projekt Red has said that won’t come until later in summer at Gamescom. Feel free to still dream, though.
paragraphs.cn: 至于那些极不可能的事，不，我们不会看到任何与《GTA6》相关的内容，也别指望能看到《巫师3》新公布的《旧时曲》扩展包实机演示，因为CDPR表示那要等到夏末的科隆游戏展。不过，你仍然可以做梦。

paragraphs.en: And that’s all the speculation I have for you ahead of the show. I can’t list literally every video game that is, or may be in development around the globe, but I’ve given it a decent shot. What are you most excited to see at Summer Game Fest 2026? Let us know in the comments!
paragraphs.cn: 以上就是我在展会前为你准备的所有猜测。我无法列出全球所有正在或可能开发中的游戏，但我已经尽力了。你最期待在2026年夏日游戏节上看到什么？在评论区告诉我们吧！

translated_terms.Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced: 刺客信条：黑旗 记忆重置
